titleStmt.title: SII 38.408: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 408. (A.R. No. 408 of 1912.) MARUDĀḌU, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the west base, central shrine, Purandarēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kulōttuṅga Chōḷa I Year 32: 1102 A.D.

summary.p: Builtin. Records the gift of land, (measuring) two taḍi, after purchase, by Sikkaluḍaiyāṉ Vēḷāṉ Vaḻuvānilaiyāṉ Vaḷavaṉ Muvē[ndavēḷāṉ] from the ūrār of Marudāḍu alias Vikramaśōḻanallūr after paying both for the cost of the land and the taxes accruing to the land. The individual then donated the same for the purpose of providing food offerings to the god Umāśkanda ••••••Avanimuḻuḍai-nāyakkar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cuṅkatavittu Iruṇikki Ulakāṇṭa śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 2 Āvatu marutāṭāna vikkirama coḻanallūr Ūro
m peruntirukkoyil Umāskan=tasa Avaṉimuḻutuṭaināyakarkku candrātittavarai tiruvamutukku cikkaluṭaiyāṉ veḷān
vaḻuvānilaiyāṉ vaḷavaṉ muventa veḷāṉ Emmilicain=ta vilaiyaṟa Iṭṭu Iṟai Iḻicci taṭi Iraṇṭukkum kiḻpāṟkellai naṭuvil viḷaṅkālukku meṟkum muṭi cūṭṭukkaḷiṉ vaṭa varampukku vaṭakkum melpa taṉ paḷḷacceṟuvum kaḻuvalukkum
kiḻvarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapā �tai kiḻāṉ ceṟuviṉ teṉvarampukkut te paṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi Iṟai Iḻicci viṟṟuk kuṭu ttukku Iṟaikoḷḷilum Ūriḷaṅkālāl Ā nellucceluttak kaṭavomākavum
celuttomākil tiruvāṇai ma ṇṭamum paṭṭu niman=tamuñ celuttakkaṭavo ttom Ūrkkuccamain=ta tevaṉ tavaviri Upikā
m pakkaṉum Attimallaṉtāṅkiyum U t taṉma māheśvarare Aṉṟāṭukovukku A ttak kaṭavarkaḷākavum sammatittu cilālekaiceytom Ivakaḷ Ivvūrk kāṇittaccaṉ kaṇavati ṉ marutāṭunāṭṭup peruṉtaccaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.408 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
